docket_entries.description: PAYMENT OF WAIVED FEES (FEB-13-2026 COMPLAINT/PETITION/FIRST PAPER) (CONFIDENTIAL) PAID BY PLAINTIFF PAYNE, KATELYN

MASTER CALENDAR FEE WAIVER HEARING ON FEB-25-2026 IN DEPT. 206 - HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF KATELYN PAYNE'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT.
